name: mirror-app
description: An Electron app to mirror PowerPoint and PDF files.

scripts.portable:zip: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$zip = 'dist\\PPT-Mirror-App-portable.zip'; if (Test-Path $zip) { Remove-Item -Force $zip }; $exePath = (Resolve-Path 'dist\\win-unpacked\\PPT Mirror App.exe').Path; Get-Process -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -eq $exePath } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist\\win-unpacked\\*' -DestinationPath $zip -Force"

author: Triangle Blvd
